name: finite_time_center_crossing_consolidation_sweep
description: Tests whether the four center-crossing line patterns consolidate to stable owners within a fixed presentation budget under the minimal signed-spike model (no budget, refractory=0, cap=thr/3). Sweeps seeds x dwell x schedule to quantify seed sensitivity and time-to-stable-owner.
hypothesis: Consolidation is seed-symmetry-limited: baseline leaves many patterns split ~0.5 because symmetric ties are never broken, so inhibition + signed learning cannot reliably amplify a single owner within ~200 presentations per pattern.
